subcodes.first_line: O sapling beside the stream of contentment, thou who art that verdant garden and celestial meadow, that paradise adorned with the glory of the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال جویبار رضا آن حدیقه غلبا و روضه رضوی و فردوس مزین رضاء بملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @firmness in the Covenant
